creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: delphij
Date: Mon Jan  4 01:13:05 2010
New Revision: 201461
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/201461

Log:
  MFC r200793:
  
  Plug a memory leak.
  
  PR:		bin/141836
  Submitted by:	Henning Petersen <henning.petersen at t-online.de>
  MFC after:	2 weeks

Modified:
  stable/7/usr.bin/finger/finger.c
Directory Properties:
  stable/7/usr.bin/finger/   (props changed)

Modified: stable/7/usr.bin/finger/finger.c
==============================================================================
--- stable/7/usr.bin/finger/finger.c	Mon Jan  4 01:13:03 2010	(r201460)
+++ stable/7/usr.bin/finger/finger.c	Mon Jan  4 01:13:05 2010	(r201461)
@@ -373,6 +373,7 @@ net:	for (p = nargv; *p;) {
 		    printf("\n");
 	}
 
+	free(used);
 	if (entries == 0)
 		return;
